raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The initiative aims to invest $22 million in UC-run business incubators.",
    "Business incubators play a vital role in converting taxpayer-funded research into new businesses and high-paying jobs.",
    "UC business incubators contribute to California's economic development by fostering innovation and start-up businesses.",
    "The funding will lead to new innovative businesses and provide significant returns to California.",
    "The initiative proposes a targeted investment of $2 million per year for three years at each UC campus and the Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory.",
    "This funding is intended to establish a robust innovation infrastructure at each campus.",
    "The University of California is a significant source of technology, talent, and support for new companies in California.",
    "There are currently 16 UC-run business incubators across the UC campuses.",
    "Since 1980, 843 companies have been formed to commercialize UC technology, with 84% still located in California."
  ]
}
```
